title: MCDW Enchantment Icons Add-On
description: Add-on to Mickey Joe's Minecraft Dungeons Enchantment Icons pack
body:
This is an Add-On pack to [Mickey Joe's Enchantment Icons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mickey-joes-enchantments)

Adds enchantment icon support to the following mods:
- [MC Dungeons Weapons](https://modrinth.com/mod/mcdw)
- [MC Dungeons Armors](https://modrinth.com/mod/mcda)
- [MC Dungeons Enchanting](https://modrinth.com/mod/mc-dungeons-enchanting)
- [Combat Roll](https://modrinth.com/mod/combat-roll)
- [Charm](https://modrinth.com/mod/charm)

Please support the original authors of the resource pack and mod.
